package.name: openral_octomap_bridge
package.description: ADR-0030 — lower an OctoMap into the C++ safety kernel's dense base-frame OccupancyVoxels grid. Keeps the octomap dependency OUT of the safety kernel: this perception-side node does the octree deserialization + TF crop, the kernel does the allocation-free rasterized capsule-vs-voxel check.
